title: Disco Elysium Gunfight Minimal Cardification Spec
goal: Implement a single-encounter prototype that converts dialogue choices into emergent thought cards, working memory, intention tracks, and automatic gunfight resolution.
non_goals: No direct shoot button as primary player action
No evidence cards unless unlocked by prior investigation flags
No skill voice cards as purchasable shop goods
acceptance_tests: Player can explain why the dominant intention fired.
Evidence only appears if prior flags unlock it.
Refresh increases pressure or other danger tracks.
Harry falling remains a high-certainty structural result.
Kim warning depends on relationship, Authority, kept cards, and body state.
